meals.name: Breakfast
meals.recipe_title: Egg White Omelette with Spinach and Feta
instructions: Heat olive oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add spinach and cook until wilted.
Pour in egg whites and cook until set.
Sprinkle feta cheese on top and fold omelette.

swap_options.recipe_title: Greek Yogurt with Berries and Almonds
instructions: Mix Greek yogurt with berries.
Top with almonds and serve.

meals.name: Lunch
meals.recipe_title: Grilled Chicken Breast with Quinoa and Broccoli
instructions: Grill chicken breast until fully cooked.
Cook quinoa according to package instructions.
Steam broccoli until tender.
Drizzle olive oil over chicken and serve with quinoa and broccoli.

swap_options.recipe_title: Turkey Breast with Rice and Green Beans
instructions: Cook turkey in a pan until browned.
Serve with cooked rice and steamed green beans.
Drizzle olive oil over the dish.

meals.name: Dinner
meals.recipe_title: Salmon with Sweet Potato and Asparagus
instructions: Preheat oven to 200°C (400°F).
Place salmon on a baking sheet, drizzle with olive oil.
Roast sweet potatoes and asparagus alongside salmon for 20 minutes.
Serve together.

swap_options.recipe_title: Cod with Mashed Potatoes and Peas
instructions: Boil potatoes and mash with butter.
Steam peas until tender.
Pan-fry cod until cooked through and serve with mashed potatoes and peas.

meals.name: Snack
meals.recipe_title: Cottage Cheese with Pineapple
instructions: Mix cottage cheese with pineapple chunks and serve.

swap_options.recipe_title: Protein Shake with Banana
instructions: Blend whey protein, banana, and milk until smooth.
Serve immediately.

meals.name: Breakfast
meals.recipe_title: Scrambled Eggs with Turkey and Avocado
instructions: Heat olive oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add turkey and cook until browned.
Add eggs and scramble until cooked through.
Serve with sliced avocado.

swap_options.recipe_title: Egg White and Turkey Omelette
instructions: Heat olive oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add turkey and spinach, cook until turkey is browned and spinach is wilted.
Pour egg whites over turkey and spinach, cook until set.
Fold omelette and serve.

meals.name: Lunch
meals.recipe_title: Beef Stir-Fry with Vegetables and Rice
instructions: Cook ground beef in a pan until browned.
Add broccoli and stir-fry until tender.
Mix in soy sauce and serve over cooked rice.

swap_options.recipe_title: Chicken Stir-Fry with Vegetables and Quinoa
instructions: Cook chicken in a pan until fully cooked.
Add bell pepper and stir-fry until tender.
Mix in soy sauce and serve over cooked quinoa.

meals.name: Dinner
meals.recipe_title: Baked Cod with Roasted Potatoes and Green Beans
instructions: Preheat oven to 200°C (400°F).
Place cod on a baking sheet, drizzle with olive oil.
Roast potatoes and green beans alongside cod for 20 minutes.
Serve together.

swap_options.recipe_title: Grilled Salmon with Quinoa and Asparagus
instructions: Grill salmon until cooked through.
Cook quinoa according to package instructions.
Steam asparagus until tender.
Serve salmon with quinoa and asparagus.

meals.name: Snack
meals.recipe_title: Greek Yogurt with Honey and Almonds
instructions: Mix Greek yogurt with honey.
Top with almonds and serve.

swap_options.recipe_title: Cottage Cheese with Berries
instructions: Mix cottage cheese with berries and serve.

meals.name: Breakfast
meals.recipe_title: Protein Pancakes with Berries
instructions: Blend oats, whey protein, and egg whites to form a batter.
Cook pancakes on a non-stick pan over medium heat until golden brown.
Top with mixed berries and serve.

swap_options.recipe_title: Greek Yogurt with Granola and Berries
instructions: Mix Greek yogurt with granola.
Top with mixed berries and serve.

meals.name: Lunch
meals.recipe_title: Chicken Caesar Salad
instructions: Grill chicken breast until cooked through.
Chop romaine lettuce and place in a bowl.
Add sliced chicken, Caesar dressing, and parmesan cheese.
Toss to combine and serve.

swap_options.recipe_title: Turkey and Avocado Salad
instructions: Cook turkey in a pan until browned.
Mix with avocado and mixed greens.
Drizzle with olive oil and serve.

meals.name: Dinner
meals.recipe_title: Grilled Steak with Sweet Potato Fries
instructions: Preheat grill to medium-high heat.
Grill steak until desired doneness.
Cut sweet potatoes into fries and bake at 200°C (400°F) for 20 minutes.
Steam green beans until tender.
Serve steak with sweet potato fries and green beans.

swap_options.recipe_title: Chicken Thighs with Mashed Potatoes
instructions: Preheat oven to 200°C (400°F).
Bake chicken thighs until cooked through.
Boil potatoes and mash with butter.
Steam peas until tender.
Serve chicken with mashed potatoes and peas.

meals.name: Snack
meals.recipe_title: Cottage Cheese with Sliced Banana
instructions: Mix cottage cheese with sliced banana and serve.

swap_options.recipe_title: Protein Shake with Peanut Butter
instructions: Blend whey protein, peanut butter, and milk until smooth.
Serve immediately.

meals.name: Breakfast
meals.recipe_title: Oatmeal with Whey Protein and Berries
instructions: Cook oats in milk until soft.
Stir in whey protein until well mixed.
Top with mixed berries and serve.

swap_options.recipe_title: Greek Yogurt with Honey and Walnuts
instructions: Mix Greek yogurt with honey.
Top with walnuts and serve.

meals.name: Lunch
meals.recipe_title: Turkey Burger with Sweet Potato Fries
instructions: Form turkey into a patty and grill until cooked through.
Bake sweet potato fries at 200°C (400°F) for 20 minutes.
Serve turkey burger on a bun with lettuce and sweet potato fries.

swap_options.recipe_title: Chicken Sandwich with Avocado
instructions: Grill chicken breast until cooked through.
Assemble sandwich with chicken, avocado, and lettuce between bread slices.
Serve immediately.

meals.name: Dinner
meals.recipe_title: Baked Salmon with Quinoa and Broccoli
instructions: Preheat oven to 200°C (400°F).
Place salmon on a baking sheet, drizzle with olive oil.
Bake for 20 minutes.
Serve with quinoa and steamed broccoli.

swap_options.recipe_title: Grilled Chicken with Rice and Asparagus
instructions: Grill chicken breast until cooked through.
Serve with cooked rice and steamed asparagus.
Drizzle olive oil over the dish.

meals.name: Snack
meals.recipe_title: Cottage Cheese with Pineapple
instructions: Mix cottage cheese with pineapple chunks and serve.

swap_options.recipe_title: Protein Shake with Banana
instructions: Blend whey protein, banana, and milk until smooth.
Serve immediately.
